# Legacy Runtime Segregation Plan

This planning note records how legacy communication runtime surfaces are separated from governance-certified communication architecture.

## Planning Concepts

- Legacy runtime inventory
- Non-certified surface labeling
- Runtime certification boundary review
- Future migration planning
- Replay, audit, and trace planning prerequisites
- Execution gate planning prerequisites
- Orchestration authorization planning prerequisites
- Human review expectations

## Boundaries

This plan does not create workflows, deployment automation, provider integrations, runtime communication, credentials, branch protection settings, route rewrites, or automatic approvals.
